---
title: "Yooooo"
toc: false
about:
  image: coolpic.jpg
  template: jolla
  image-shape: rectangle
  image-width: 20em
---

:::{#bio}

Whatup guys im a pokemon master

This website will be cool trust me

::: {#landing-icons}
[{{< fa brands github title="github" >}}](https://github.com/Muizzzzz/Muizzzzz.github.io){target="_blank"} &nbsp; [{{< fa envelope title="envelope" >}}](khanm@lawrence.edu)
:::
:::
